codeReview.summary: The regression gate was executed, but required gate criteria are not fully satisfied: the recorded bundle size exceeds the declared ≤990000 threshold and no lint run is recorded for this final gate.

issues.description: Bundle-size gate failed in the worker's own evidence: dist/index.js is reported as 993402 bytes, while the feature and contract gate require ≤990000 (see features.json and VAL-SCHEMA-016).

No lint execution is recorded in verification.commandsRun for this final regression gate (command list includes init/log/test/typecheck/build/diff/status only). This leaves the stated lint-clean requirement unverified.

sharedStateObservations.observation: core-worker procedure is not aligned with verification-only regression-gate features: it mandates red-first test authoring, which the worker necessarily skipped and flagged as a deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.deviations in the reviewed handoff cites skipping SKILL.md step '3. Write failing tests FIRST'; core-worker SKILL.md line 42+ requires this for every feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance and feature-specific verification expectations are inconsistent about gate commands (lint/deadcode).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 68 and core-worker SKILL.md lines 58-62 require lint/deadcode evidence in commandsRun, while this feature's features.json verificationSteps lines 1463-1467 only require test, typecheck, build-size, and test-diff checks.

summary: Review failed: evidence shows bundle-size threshold violation (993402 > 990000) and missing lint-gate evidence for this final regression gate; shared-state gaps were also noted around skill/procedure alignment for verification-only features.
